description: This file controls the unit statistics for player mercenaries and their related functions. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Hireling
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the Hireling name

columns.name: *SubType
columns.description: Sous-type lisible ; colonne commentaire (prefixe *), ignoree par le jeu.

columns.name: Version
columns.description: Defines which game version to use this hireling (0 = Classic mode | 100 = Expansion mode)

columns.name: Id
columns.description: The unique identification number to define each hireling type

columns.name: Class
columns.description: This refers to the index in monstats for the base type of unit to use for the hireling

columns.name: Act
columns.description: The Act that the hireling belongs to (values 1 to 5 equal Act 1 to Act 5, respectively)

columns.name: Difficulty
columns.description: The difficulty mode associated with the hireling (1 = Normal | 2 = Nightmare | 3 = Hell)

columns.name: Level
columns.description: The starting level of the unit

columns.name: Seller
columns.description: This refers to the index in monstats which defines the unit NPC that sells this hireling

columns.name: NameFirst
columns.description: Defines a string key which the game uses as a sequential range of string IDs from .NameFirst to .NameLast to randomly generate as hireling names. (Max name length is 48 characters)

columns.name: NameLast
columns.description: Defines a string key which the game uses as a sequential range of string IDs from .NameFirst to .NameLast to randomly generate as hireling names. (Max name length is 48 characters)

columns.name: Gold
columns.description: The initial cost of the hireling. This is used in the following calculation to generate the full hire price: Cost = [.Gold] * (100 + 15 * [Difference of Current Level and .Level]) / 100

columns.name: Exp/Lvl
columns.description: This modifier is used in the following calculation to determine the amount of Experience need for the hireling's next level: [Current Level] + [Current Level] * [Current Level + 1] * [.Exp/Lvl]

columns.name: HP
columns.description: The starting amount of Life at base Level

columns.name: HP/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Life gained per Level

columns.name: Defense
columns.description: The starting amount of Defense at base Level

columns.name: Def/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Defense gained per Level

columns.name: Str
columns.description: The starting amount of Strength at base Level

columns.name: Str/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Strength gained per Level (Calculated in 8ths)

columns.name: Dex
columns.description: The starting amount of Dexterity at base Level

columns.name: Dex/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Dexterity gained per Level (Calculated in 8ths)

columns.name: AR
columns.description: The starting amount of Attack Rating at base Level

columns.name: AR/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Attack Rating gained per Level

columns.name: Dmg-Min
columns.description: The starting amount of minimum Physical Damage for attacks

columns.name: Dmg-Max
columns.description: The starting amount of maximum Physical Damage for attacks

columns.name: Dmg/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Physical Damage gained per level, to be added to .Dmg-Min and .Dmg-Max (Calculated in 8ths)

columns.name: ResistFire
columns.description: The starting amount of Fire Resistance at base Level

columns.name: ResistFire/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Fire Resistance gained per Level (Calculated in 4ths)

columns.name: ResistCold
columns.description: The starting amount of Cold Resistance at base Level

columns.name: ResistCold/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Cold Resistance gained per Level (Calculated in 4ths)

columns.name: ResistLightning
columns.description: The starting amount of Lightning Resistance at base Level

columns.name: ResistLightning/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Lightning Resistance gained per Level (Calculated in 4ths)

columns.name: ResistPoison
columns.description: The starting amount of Poison Resistance at base Level

columns.name: ResistPoison/Lvl
columns.description: The amount of Poison Resistance gained per Level (Calculated in 4ths)

columns.name: HireDesc
columns.description: This accepts a string key, which is used to display as the special description of the hireling in the hire UI window

columns.name: DefaultChance
columns.description: This is the chance for the hireling to attack with their weapon instead of using a Skill. All Chance values are summed together as a denominator value for a random roll to determine which skill to use.

columns.name: Skill1
columns.description: This gives the hireling a Skill to use (requires .Mode#, .Chance#, .ChancePerLvl#)

columns.name: Mode1
columns.description: Uses a monster mode to determine the hireling's behavior when using the related Skill (Corresponds to MonMode.name, use the numeric ID)

columns.name: Chance1
columns.description: This is the base chance for the hireling to use the related Skill. All Chance values are summed together as a denominator value for a random roll to determine which skill to use.

columns.name: ChancePerLvl1
columns.description: This is the chance for the hireling to use the related Skill, affected by the difference in the hireling's current Level and the hireling's .Level field. All Chance values are summed together as a denominator value for a random roll to determine which skill to use. Each skill Chance is calculated with the following formula: [.Chance#] + [.ChancePerLvl#] * [Difference of Current Level and .Level] / 4

columns.name: Level1
columns.description: The starting Level for the related Skill.

columns.name: LvlPerLvl1
columns.description: A modifier to increase the related Skill level for every Level gained. This is used in the following calculated to determine the current skill level: [Current Skill Level] = FLOOR([.Level#] + (([.LvlPerLvl#] * [Difference of Current Level and .Level]) / 32))

columns.name: Skill2
columns.description: This gives the hireling a Skill to use (requires .Mode#, .Chance#, .ChancePerLvl#)

columns.name: Mode2
columns.description: Uses a monster mode to determine the hireling's behavior when using the related Skill (Corresponds to MonMode.name, use the numeric ID)

columns.name: Chance2
columns.description: This is the base chance for the hireling to use the related Skill. All Chance values are summed together as a denominator value for a random roll to determine which skill to use.

columns.name: ChancePerLvl2
columns.description: This is the chance for the hireling to use the related Skill, affected by the difference in the hireling's current Level and the hireling's .Level field. All Chance values are summed together as a denominator value for a random roll to determine which skill to use. Each skill Chance is calculated with the following formula: [.Chance#] + [.ChancePerLvl#] * [Difference of Current Level and .Level] / 4

columns.description: A modifier to increase the related Skill level for every Level gained. This is used in the following calculated to determine the current skill level: [Current Skill Level] = FLOOR([.Level#] + (([.LvlPerLvl#] * [Difference of Current Level and .Level]) / 32))

columns.name: HiringMaxLevelDifference
columns.description: This is used to generate a range with this value plus and minus with the player's current Level. In the hiring UI window, hirelings start with a random Level that is between this range.

columns.name: resurrectcostmultiplier
columns.description: A modifier used to calculate the hireling's current resurrect cost. Used in the following formula: [Resurrect Cost] = [Current Level] * [Current Level] / [.resurrectcostdivisor] * [.resurrectcostmultiplier]

columns.name: resurrectcostdivisor
columns.description: A modifier used to calculate the hireling's current resurrect cost. Used in the following formula: [Resurrect Cost] = [Current Level] * [Current Level] / [.resurrectcostdivisor] * [.resurrectcostmultiplier]

columns.name: resurrectcostmax
columns.description: This is the maximum Gold cost to resurrect this hireling

columns.name: equivalentcharclass
columns.description: Determines what class this hireling is treated like under the hood when calculating skill level bonuses and gear restrictions.
